languages.text: "За смерть великого полководца, что когда-то схлестнулся с врагом в этом регионе космоса. Сам Кхейн вел его руку, вложив в нее свой меч. Но даже этого оказалось недостаточно".
"For the demise of a great warlord, who once clashed with the enemy in this very sector. Khaine himself deigned to guide his hand, bestowing his own sword upon him. Yet, even that was not enough."
languages.original_text: "За смерть великого полководца, что когда-то схлестнулся с врагом в этом регионе космоса. Сам Кхейн вел его руку, вложив в нее свой меч. Но даже этого оказалось недостаточно".

traits.locale_text: "For the demise of the great warlord, who once clashed with the enemy in this very sector. Khaine himself deigned to guide his hand, bestowing his own sword upon him. Yet, even that was not enough."

"For the demise of a great warlord, who once clashed with the enemy in this very sector. Khaine himself deigned to guide his hand, bestowing his own sword upon him. Yet, even that was not enough."

languages.text: “为了一位伟大战争领主的陨落，他曾在此星区与那宿敌交锋。凯恩甚至屈尊出手指引他，还将自己的剑赐予了他。然而，即便如此，仍是不够。”
languages.original_text: "For the demise of a great warlord, who once clashed with the enemy in this very sector. Khaine himself deigned to guide his hand, bestowing his own sword upon him. Yet, even that was not enough."

traits.locale_text: “为了一位伟大战争领主的陨落，他曾在此星区与那宿敌交锋。凯恩甚至屈尊出手指引他，还将自己的剑赐予了他。然而，即便如此，仍是不够。”

languages.text: "Bir zamanlar tam da bu sektörde düşmanla çarpışan ulu bir savaş efendisinin ölümünün. Khaine'in bizzat kendisi ona rehberlik etmeye lütfetti, kendi kılıcını bahşetti. Gelgelelim bu bile yeterli olmadı."
languages.original_text: "For the demise of a great warlord, who once clashed with the enemy in this very sector. Khaine himself deigned to guide his hand, bestowing his own sword upon him. Yet, even that was not enough."

traits.locale_text: "Bir zamanlar tam da bu sektörde düşmanla çarpışan ulu bir savaş efendisinin ölümünün. Khaine'in bizzat kendisi ona rehberlik etmeye lütfetti, kendi kılıcını bahşetti. Gelgelelim bu bile yeterli olmadı."

languages.text: « Pour la mort d'un grand Seigneur de guerre, qui a autrefois affronté l'ennemi de ce secteur. Khaine lui-même guidait sa main. Il lui avait même confié son épée. Toutefois, cela n'a pas suffi. »
languages.original_text: "For the demise of a great warlord, who once clashed with the enemy in this very sector. Khaine himself deigned to guide his hand, bestowing his own sword upon him. Yet, even that was not enough."

traits.locale_text: « Pour la mort d'un grand Seigneur de guerre, qui a autrefois affronté l'ennemi de ce secteur. Khaine lui-même guidait sa main. Il lui avait même confié son épée. Toutefois, cela n'a pas suffi. »

languages.text: «De la perdición de un gran señor de la guerra que se enfrentó antaño al enemigo en este mismo sector. El propio Khaine decidió guiar su mano proporcionándole su propia espada. Sin embargo, ni siquiera aquello fue suficiente».
languages.original_text: "For the demise of a great warlord, who once clashed with the enemy in this very sector. Khaine himself deigned to guide his hand, bestowing his own sword upon him. Yet, even that was not enough."

traits.locale_text: «De la perdición de un gran señor de la guerra que se enfrentó antaño al enemigo en este mismo sector. El propio Khaine decidió guiar su mano proporcionándole su propia espada. Sin embargo, ni siquiera aquello fue suficiente».

languages.text: "Für den Tod eines mächtigen Kriegsherren, der einst in diesem Sektor mit dem Feind rang. Khaine selbst führte seine Hand und gewährte ihm sein eigenes Schwert. Doch selbst das war nicht genug."
languages.original_text: "For the demise of a great warlord, who once clashed with the enemy in this very sector. Khaine himself deigned to guide his hand, bestowing his own sword upon him. Yet, even that was not enough."

traits.locale_text: "Für den Tod eines mächtigen Kriegsherren, der einst in diesem Sektor mit dem Feind rang. Khaine selbst führte seine Hand und gewährte ihm sein eigenes Schwert. Doch selbst das war nicht genug."

languages.text: 「かつてこの地で敵と戦った大将の死。カイン自身がその手を取って、自らの剣を与えた。それでも足りなかった」
languages.original_text: "For the demise of a great warlord, who once clashed with the enemy in this very sector. Khaine himself deigned to guide his hand, bestowing his own sword upon him. Yet, even that was not enough."
